text.title: Architecture Decision Records Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Architecture Decision Records end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: gather-context
step.action: Extract the decision being made and its forces.

step.name: enumerate-alternatives
step.action: List ≥2 alternatives with pros/cons + rejection reason.

step.name: draft-consequences
step.action: Write positive, negative, and neutral consequences grounded in the inputs.

step.name: human-review
step.action: Reviewer flips status to Accepted or returns with comments.
